allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in 9007,9008,9123,9124,9125\) { try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "killed $_ on $p" } } catch { "free $p" } })
